mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TMP.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY product_name) AS RN FROM ( SELECT product.ID AS PRODUCT_ID, product.name AS PRODUCT_NAME, product.name AS MATERIAL_NUMBER, product.VALUE AS MATERIAL_NAME, product.VIRTUALNAME AS STYLE_NUMBER, product.M_DIM1_ID AS BRAND_ID, brand.ATTRIBNAME AS BRAND_NAME, product.M_DIM4_ID AS KIND_ID, Kind.ATTRIBNAME AS KIND_NAME, product.colorsalias AS COLOR, product.PRICELIST AS PRICE, product.THEME_NAME AS EXECUTION_STANDARD, product.INTSCODE AS EAN13, '中国' AS ORIGIN, 'B.C.SPORTS' AS MANUFACTURER, '福建省厦门市思明区体育路88号' AS MANUFACTURER_ADDRESS, '0592-8888888' AS CONTACT_PHONE, product.FABCODE AS FAB_CODE, product.FABELEMENT AS FAB_ELEMENT, product.ACCODE AS AC_CODE, product.ACCELEMENT AS ACC_ELEMENT, product.M_SIZEGROUP_ID AS SIZEGROUP_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(c.VALUE2_CODE, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.VALUE2_CODE) FROM M_PRODUCT_ALIAS a LEFT JOIN M_ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCE c ON a.M_ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCE_ID = c.id WHERE a.M_PRODUCT_ID = product.ID AND c.VALUE2_CODE IS NOT NULL) AS SIZES FROM M_PRODUCT product LEFT JOIN M_DIM brand ON product.M_DIM1_ID = brand.ID LEFT JOIN M_DIM Kind ON product.M_DIM4_ID = Kind.ID
) TMP ) WHERE RN > #{offset} AND RN <= #{offset} + #{pageSize}

SELECT product.name AS MATERIAL_NUMBER, product.VALUE AS MATERIAL_NAME, product.VIRTUALNAME AS STYLE_NUMBER, product.M_DIM1_ID AS BRAND_ID, brand.ATTRIBNAME AS BRAND_NAME, product.M_DIM4_ID AS KIND_ID, Kind.ATTRIBNAME AS KIND_NAME, product.colorsalias AS COLOR, product.PRICELIST AS PRICE, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(100)) AS EXECUTION_STANDARD, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS EAN13, product.M_SIZEGROUP_ID AS SIZEGROUP_ID, product.SIZES AS SIZES FROM M_PRODUCT product LEFT JOIN M_DIM brand ON product.M_DIM1_ID = brand.ID LEFT JOIN M_DIM Kind ON product.M_DIM4_ID = Kind.ID WHERE product.name = #{ean13}
SELECT ID, ATTRIBNAME FROM M_DIM WHERE M_DIMDEF_ID = 1 and DIMFLAG = 'DIM1' ORDER BY ATTRIBCODE ASC
SELECT ID, ATTRIBNAME FROM M_DIM WHERE M_DIMDEF_ID = 4 and DIMFLAG = 'DIM4' ORDER BY ATTRIBCODE ASC

SELECT product.NAME AS MATERIAL_NUMBER, product.VALUE AS MATERIAL_NAME, barcode.NO AS BARCODE, c.VALUE1_CODE AS COLOR, c.VALUE2_CODE AS SIZES FROM M_PRODUCT product LEFT JOIN M_PRODUCT_ALIAS barcode ON product.ID = barcode.M_PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN M_ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCE c ON barcode.M_ATTRIBUTESETINSTANCE_ID = c.id WHERE product.ID = #{productId} AND barcode.NO IS NOT NULL
